project_type: Next.js 16 App Router multi-agent AI engineering room with event-sourced architecture
build_system: npm scripts wrapping Next.js build, Prisma codegen, vitest
test_framework: Vitest + fast-check property-based testing. Tests in co-located .test.ts files and src/components/workspace/__tests__/
build_command: npm run build (requires node_modules - NOT available in this sandbox)
test_command: npm run test (requires node_modules - NOT available in this sandbox)
verification_instructions: Since network is INTEGRATIONS_ONLY (npm registry blocked by proxy), use AST-level TypeScript validation. Verify files compile logically, types align, imports resolve to existing files, and tests follow existing patterns.
snapshot_or_generated_files: src/generated/prisma/ - generated by 'npx prisma generate'. Not regeneratable in this sandbox.
setup_instructions: npm install && npx prisma generate && npx prisma db push - NONE of these work in this sandbox due to network restrictions
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network mode. npm registry is 403 via proxy. Cannot install dependencies, run build, lint, or tests. Must rely on code correctness by following existing patterns exactly. node_modules is partially installed (407 packages, but missing vitest, next, typescript, etc).
contribution_requirements: Extend existing event-sourced architecture. State projector must remain pure. New event types need case in switch/case. Structured outputs validated with Zod. Context assembled through contextAssembler. Follow existing file patterns and naming conventions.
key_patterns: Event types defined in src/types/domain.ts EventType union. State projector at src/lib/state-projector.ts uses switch/case. Context assembler at src/lib/context-assembler.ts fetches constraints from projected state. Prompt builder at src/lib/prompt-builder.ts formats constraints as '- [category] text'. API routes at src/app/api/sessions/[sessionId]/. UI components at src/components/workspace/. Schemas at src/schemas/ using Zod 4. Tests use fast-check arbitraries with vi.mock().
directory_structure: src/app/ - Next.js App Router pages and API routes; src/lib/ - domain layer (event store, projector, orchestrator, assembler, etc); src/types/ - TypeScript interfaces; src/schemas/ - Zod validation schemas; src/components/workspace/ - workspace UI components; src/hooks/ - React hooks (useSession, useEventStream, etc); prisma/ - Prisma schema; .kiro/ - (to be created) Kiro specs and steering
